reviews.review_description: What up! DoubtNot here! I've been working alone on this project for months now and I'm so so proud of it and excited for you all to check it out🤣. Now the game has it's bugs and I'll go back in and update it and add to the game as time goes on but I believe it's at a point where I can share it with you. Hope you like it and enjoy the building process with me

I downloaded the game and I was able to open the game as well but I was unable to press the start button due to the fact that I didn't have any hands in the game. I am unsure if I am required to use the hand tracking as it's never specified. Maybe it's because I'm using the first oculus quest but until I get an answer my review still stands.
